1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.mysite.cards
 2→
 3→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.SiteModel
 4→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.AccountStore
 5→import org.wordpress.android.ui.blaze.BlazeFeatureUtils
 6→import org.wordpress.android.ui.blaze.BlazeFlowSource
 7→import org.wordpress.android.ui.blaze.blazecampaigns.campaignlisting.CampaignListingPageSource
 8→import org.wordpress.android.ui.jetpackoverlay.JetpackFeatureRemovalPhaseHelper
 9→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mysite.SiteNavigationAction
10→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mysite.items.listitem.ListItemAction
11→import org.wordpress.android.ui.quickstart.QuickStartEvent
12→import javax.inject.Inject
13→
14→class ListItemActionHandler @Inject constructor(
15→    private val accountStore: AccountStore,
16→    private val jetpackFeatureRemovalPhaseHelper: JetpackFeatureRemovalPhaseHelper,
17→    private val blazeFeatureUtils: BlazeFeatureUtils
18→) {
19→    fun handleAction(
20→        action: ListItemAction,
21→        selectedSite: SiteModel,
22→        quickStartEvent: QuickStartEvent? = null
23→    ): SiteNavigationAction {
24→        return when (action) {
25→            ListItemAction.ACTIVITY_LOG -> SiteNavigationAction.OpenActivityLog(selectedSite)
26→            ListItemAction.BACKUP -> SiteNavigationAction.OpenBackup(selectedSite)
27→            ListItemAction.SCAN -> SiteNavigationAction.OpenScan(selectedSite)
28→            ListItemAction.PLAN -> SiteNavigationAction.OpenPlan(selectedSite)
29→            ListItemAction.POSTS -> SiteNavigationAction.OpenPosts(selectedSite)
30→            ListItemAction.PAGES -> SiteNavigationAction.OpenPages(selectedSite)
31→            ListItemAction.ADMIN -> SiteNavigationAction.OpenAdmin(selectedSite)
32→            ListItemAction.PEOPLE -> SiteNavigationAction.OpenPeople(selectedSite)
33→            ListItemAction.SHARING -> SiteNavigationAction.OpenSharing(selectedSite)
34→            ListItemAction.DOMAINS -> SiteNavigationAction.OpenDomains(selectedSite)
35→            ListItemAction.ME -> SiteNavigationAction.OpenMeScreen
36→            ListItemAction.SITE_SETTINGS -> SiteNavigationAction.OpenSiteSettings(selectedSite)
37→            ListItemAction.THEMES -> SiteNavigationAction.OpenThemes(selectedSite)
38→            ListItemAction.PLUGINS -> SiteNavigationAction.OpenPlugins(selectedSite)
39→            ListItemAction.STATS -> getStatsNavigationActionForSite(selectedSite)
40→            ListItemAction.MEDIA -> SiteNavigationAction.OpenMedia(selectedSite)
41→            ListItemAction.COMMENTS -> SiteNavigationAction.OpenUnifiedComments(selectedSite)
42→            ListItemAction.BLAZE -> onBlazeMenuItemClick()
43→            ListItemAction.MORE -> SiteNavigationAction.OpenMore(selectedSite, quickStartEvent)
44→        }
45→    }
46→
47→    private fun getStatsNavigationActionForSite(site: SiteModel): SiteNavigationAction = when {
48→        // if we are in static posters phase - we don't want to show any connection/login messages
49→        jetpackFeatureRemovalPhaseHelper.shouldShowStaticPage() ->
50→            SiteNavigationAction.ShowJetpackRemovalStaticPostersView
51→
52→        // If the user is not logged in and the site is already connected to Jetpack, ask to login.
53→        !accountStore.hasAccessToken() && site.isJetpackConnected -> SiteNavigationAction.StartWPComLoginForJetpackStats
54→
55→        // If it's a WordPress.com or Jetpack site, show the Stats screen.
56→        site.isWPCom || site.isJetpackInstalled && site.isJetpackConnected -> SiteNavigationAction.OpenStats(site)
57→
58→        // If it's a self-hosted site, ask to connect to Jetpack.
59→        else -> SiteNavigationAction.ConnectJetpackForStats(site)
60→    }
61→
62→    private fun onBlazeMenuItemClick(): SiteNavigationAction {
63→        if (blazeFeatureUtils.shouldShowBlazeCampaigns()) {
64→            return SiteNavigationAction.OpenCampaignListingPage(CampaignListingPageSource.MENU_ITEM)
65→        }
66→        return SiteNavigationAction.OpenPromoteWithBlazeOverlay(BlazeFlowSource.MENU_ITEM)
67→    }
68→}

 63→class UnifiedCommentListViewModel @Inject constructor(
 64→    private val commentListUiModelHelper: CommentListUiModelHelper,
 65→    private val selectedSiteRepository: SelectedSiteRepository,
 66→    private val networkUtilsWrapper: NetworkUtilsWrapper,
 67→    private val analyticsTrackerWrapper: AnalyticsTrackerWrapper,
 68→    @Named(BG_THREAD) private val bgDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher,
 69→    @Named(UI_THREAD) private val mainDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher,
 70→    private val unifiedCommentsListHandler: UnifiedCommentsListHandler,
 71→    localCommentCacheUpdateHandler: LocalCommentCacheUpdateHandler
 72→) : ScopedViewModel(mainDispatcher) {
 73→    private var isStarted = false
 74→    private lateinit var commentFilter: CommentFilter
 75→
 76→    private val _commentsUpdateListener = localCommentCacheUpdateHandler.subscribe()
 77→
 78→    private val _onSnackbarMessage = MutableSharedFlow<SnackbarMessageHolder>()
 79→    private val _selectedComments = MutableStateFlow(emptyList<SelectedComment>())
 80→
 81→    private val _batchModerationStatus = MutableStateFlow<BatchModerationStatus>(BatchModerationStatus.Idle)
 82→
 83→    val onSnackbarMessage: SharedFlow<SnackbarMessageHolder> = _onSnackbarMessage
 84→
 85→    private var commentInModeration = ArrayList<Long>()
 86→
 87→    // TODO maybe we can change to some generic Action pattern
 88→    private val _onCommentDetailsRequested = MutableSharedFlow<SelectedComment>()
 89→    val onCommentDetailsRequested: SharedFlow<SelectedComment> = _onCommentDetailsRequested
 90→
 91→    private val _commentsProvider = unifiedCommentsListHandler.subscribe()
 92→
 93→    val uiState: StateFlow<CommentsUiModel> by lazy {
 94→        combine(
 95→            _commentsProvider.filter { it.type == PAGINATE_USE_CASE }.filterIsInstance<CommentsPagingResult>(),
 96→            _selectedComments,
 97→            _batchModerationStatus
 98→        ) { commentData, selectedCommentIds, batchModerationStatus ->
 99→            commentListUiModelHelper.buildUiModel(
100→                commentFilter,
101→                commentData,
102→                selectedCommentIds,
103→                batchModerationStatus,
104→                uiState.replayCache.firstOrNull(),
105→                this::toggleItem,
106→                this::clickItem,
107→                this::requestNextPage,
108→                this::moderateSelectedComments,
109→                this::onBatchModerationConfirmationCanceled
110→            )
111→        }.stateIn(
112→            scope = viewModelScope,
113→            started = SharingStarted.Companion.WhileSubscribed(UI_STATE_FLOW_TIMEOUT_MS),
114→            initialValue = CommentsUiModel.buildInitialState()
115→        )
116→    }
117→
118→    fun start(commentListFilter: CommentFilter) {
119→        if (isStarted) return
120→        isStarted = true
121→
122→        commentFilter = commentListFilter
123→
124→        listenToLocalCacheUpdateRequests()
125→        listenToSnackBarRequests()
126→        requestsFirstPage()
127→    }
128→
129→    private fun requestsFirstPage() {
130→        launch(bgDispatcher) {
131→            unifiedCommentsListHandler.requestPage(
132→                GetPageParameters(
133→                    site = selectedSiteRepository.getSelectedSite()!!,
134→                    number = if (commentFilter == UNREPLIED) UNREPLIED_COMMENT_PAGE_SIZE else COMMENT_PAGE_SIZE,
135→                    offset = 0,
136→                    commentFilter = commentFilter
137→                )
138→            )
139→        }
140→    }
141→
142→    private fun requestNextPage(offset: Int) {
143→        launch(bgDispatcher) {
144→            unifiedCommentsListHandler.requestPage(
145→                GetPageParameters(
146→                    site = selectedSiteRepository.getSelectedSite()!!,
147→                    number = if (commentFilter == UNREPLIED) {
148→                        UNREPLIED_COMMENT_PAGE_SIZE
149→                    } else {
150→                        COMMENT_PAGE_SIZE
151→                    },
152→                    offset = offset,
153→                    commentFilter = commentFilter
154→                )
155→            )
156→        }
157→    }
158→
159→    private fun listenToLocalCacheUpdateRequests() {
160→        launch(bgDispatcher) {
161→            _commentsUpdateListener.collectLatest {
162→                launch(bgDispatcher) {
163→                    unifiedCommentsListHandler.refreshFromCache(
164→                        ReloadFromCacheParameters(
165→                            pagingParameters = GetPageParameters(
166→                                site = selectedSiteRepository.getSelectedSite()!!,
167→                                number = if (commentFilter == UNREPLIED) {
168→                                    UNREPLIED_COMMENT_PAGE_SIZE
169→                                } else {
170→                                    COMMENT_PAGE_SIZE
171→                                },
172→                                offset = 0,
173→                                commentFilter = commentFilter
174→                            ),
175→                            hasMore = uiState.value.commentData.hasMore
176→                        )
177→                    )
178→                }
179→            }
180→        }
181→    }
182→
183→    private fun listenToSnackBarRequests() {
184→        launch(bgDispatcher) {
185→            _commentsProvider.filter { it is Failure }.collectLatest {
186→                val errorMessage = if (it.type == BATCH_MODERATE_USE_CASE) {
187→                    UiStringRes(R.string.comment_batch_moderation_error)
188→                } else {
189→                    if ((it as Failure).error.message.isNullOrEmpty()) {
190→                        null
191→                    } else {
192→                        UiStringText(it.error.message)
193→                    }
194→                }
195→
196→                if (errorMessage != null) {
197→                    _onSnackbarMessage.emit(SnackbarMessageHolder(errorMessage))
198→                }
199→            }
200→        }

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui
  2→
  3→import android.content.Context
  4→import android.os.Bundle
  5→import android.text.Editable
  6→import android.text.TextUtils
  7→import android.text.TextWatcher
  8→import android.view.KeyEvent
  9→import android.view.LayoutInflater
 10→import android.view.View
 11→import android.view.ViewGroup
 12→import android.view.inputmethod.EditorInfo
 13→import android.view.inputmethod.InputMethodManager
 14→import android.widget.TextView
 15→import androidx.fragment.app.Fragment
 16→import dagger.hilt.android.AndroidEntryPoint
 17→import kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineScope
 18→import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
 19→import kotlinx.coroutines.launch
 20→import org.wordpress.android.R
 21→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.SiteModel
 22→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.SiteStore
 23→import org.wordpress.android.ui.CollapseFullScreenDialogFragment.CollapseFullScreenDialogContent
 24→import org.wordpress.android.ui.CollapseFullScreenDialogFragment.CollapseFullScreenDialogController
 25→import org.wordpress.android.ui.suggestion.util.SuggestionServiceConnectionManager
 26→import org.wordpress.android.ui.suggestion.util.SuggestionUtils
 27→import org.wordpress.android.util.SiteUtils
 28→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.observeEvent
 29→import org.wordpress.android.widgets.SuggestionAutoCompleteText
 30→import javax.inject.Inject
 31→
 32→@AndroidEntryPoint
 33→class CommentFullScreenDialogFragment : Fragment(), CollapseFullScreenDialogContent {
 34→    @Inject
 35→    lateinit var viewModel: CommentFullScreenDialogViewModel
 36→
 37→    @Inject
 38→    lateinit var siteStore: SiteStore
 39→    private lateinit var dialogController: CollapseFullScreenDialogController
 40→    private lateinit var reply: SuggestionAutoCompleteText
 41→    private val coroutineScope = CoroutineScope(Dispatchers.Default)
 42→
 43→    override fun onCreateView(
 44→        inflater: LayoutInflater,
 45→        container: ViewGroup?,
 46→        savedInstanceState: Bundle?
 47→    ): View? {
 48→        val layout = inflater.inflate(R.layout.comment_dialog_fragment, container, false) as ViewGroup
 49→        reply = layout.findViewById(R.id.edit_comment_expand)
 50→        reply.initializeWithPrefix('@')
 51→        reply.requestFocus()
 52→        reply.addTextChangedListener(object : TextWatcher {
 53→            override fun beforeTextChanged(s: CharSequence, start: Int, count: Int, after: Int) {}
 54→
 55→            override fun onTextChanged(s: CharSequence, start: Int, before: Int, count: Int) {}
 56→
 57→            override fun afterTextChanged(s: Editable) {
 58→                dialogController.setConfirmEnabled(!TextUtils.isEmpty(s.toString().trim()))
 59→            }
 60→        })
 61→
 62→        reply.setOnEditorActionListener { _: TextView?, actionId: Int, _: KeyEvent? ->
 63→            if (actionId == EditorInfo.IME_ACTION_DONE || actionId == EditorInfo.IME_ACTION_SEND) {
 64→                dialogController.confirm(saveResult())
 65→            }
 66→            false
 67→        }
 68→
 69→        viewModel.onKeyboardOpened.observeEvent(viewLifecycleOwner, {
 70→            coroutineScope.launch {
 71→                val imm = activity?.getSystemService(Context.INPUT_METHOD_SERVICE) as? InputMethodManager
 72→                imm?.showSoftInput(reply, InputMethodManager.SHOW_IMPLICIT)
 73→            }
 74→        })
 75→
 76→        arguments?.let {
 77→            reply.setText(it.getString(EXTRA_REPLY))
 78→            reply.setSelection(it.getInt(EXTRA_SELECTION_START), it.getInt(EXTRA_SELECTION_END))
 79→            viewModel.init()
 80→
 81→            // Allow @username suggestion in full screen comment Editor on the Reader,
 82→            // but only on sites in the siteStore (i.e: current user's site).
 83→            // No suggestion is available for external sites that the user follows in the Reader.
 84→            val siteModel: SiteModel? = siteStore.getSiteBySiteId(it.getLong(EXTRA_SITE_ID))
 85→            if (siteModel != null) {
 86→                setupSuggestionServiceAndAdapter(siteModel)
 87→            }
 88→        }
 89→
 90→        return layout
 91→    }
 92→
 93→    private fun setupSuggestionServiceAndAdapter(site: SiteModel) {
 94→        if (!isAdded || !SiteUtils.isAccessedViaWPComRest(site)) {
 95→            return
 96→        }
 97→        val suggestionServiceConnectionManager = SuggestionServiceConnectionManager(
 98→            activity,
 99→            site.siteId
100→        )
101→        val suggestionAdapter = SuggestionUtils.setupUserSuggestions(
102→            site, requireActivity(),
103→            suggestionServiceConnectionManager
104→        )
105→        this.reply.setAdapter(suggestionAdapter)
106→    }
107→
108→    override fun onCollapseClicked(controller: CollapseFullScreenDialogController): Boolean {
109→        controller.collapse(saveResult())
110→        return true
111→    }
112→
113→    override fun onConfirmClicked(controller: CollapseFullScreenDialogController): Boolean {
114→        controller.confirm(saveResult())
115→        return true
116→    }
117→
118→    private fun saveResult(): Bundle {
119→        val result = Bundle()
120→        result.putString(RESULT_REPLY, reply.text.toString())
121→        result.putInt(RESULT_SELECTION_START, reply.selectionStart)
122→        result.putInt(RESULT_SELECTION_END, reply.selectionEnd)
123→        return result
124→    }
125→
126→    override fun onViewCreated(controller: CollapseFullScreenDialogController) {
127→        dialogController = controller
128→    }
129→
130→    companion object {
131→        const val RESULT_REPLY = "RESULT_REPLY"
132→        const val RESULT_SELECTION_START = "RESULT_SELECTION_START"
133→        const val RESULT_SELECTION_END = "RESULT_SELECTION_END"
134→
135→        private const val EXTRA_REPLY = "EXTRA_REPLY"
136→        private const val EXTRA_SELECTION_START = "EXTRA_SELECTION_START"
137→        private const val EXTRA_SELECTION_END = "EXTRA_SELECTION_END"
138→        private const val EXTRA_SITE_ID = "EXTRA_SITE_ID"
139→
140→        fun newBundle(reply: String, selectionStart: Int, selectionEnd: Int, siteId: Long): Bundle {
141→            val bundle = Bundle()
142→            bundle.putString(EXTRA_REPLY, reply)
143→            bundle.putInt(EXTRA_SELECTION_START, selectionStart)
144→            bundle.putInt(EXTRA_SELECTION_END, selectionEnd)
145→            bundle.putLong(EXTRA_SITE_ID, siteId)
146→            return bundle
147→        }
148→    }
149→}
150→

 52→@Singleton
 53→class CommentsStoreAdapter @Inject constructor(
 54→    private val unifiedStore: CommentsStore,
 55→    private val commentsMapper: CommentsMapper,
 56→    @Named(UI_THREAD) private val mainDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher,
 57→    @Named(BG_THREAD) private val bgDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher,
 58→    private val dispatcher: Dispatcher
 59→) : CoroutineScope {
 60→    private var job: Job = Job()
 61→
 62→    override val coroutineContext: CoroutineContext
 63→        get() = mainDispatcher + job
 64→
 65→    fun getCommentsForSite(
 66→        site: SiteModel?,
 67→        orderByDateAscending: Boolean,
 68→        limit: Int,
 69→        vararg statuses: CommentStatus
 70→    ): List<CommentModel> {
 71→        return runBlocking {
 72→            withContext(bgDispatcher) {
 73→                unifiedStore.getCommentsForSite(site, orderByDateAscending, limit, *statuses).map {
 74→                    commentsMapper.commentEntityToLegacyModel(it)
 75→                }
 76→            }
 77→        }
 78→    }
 79→
 80→    fun getCommentByLocalId(localId: Int): CommentModel? {
 81→        return runBlocking {
 82→            withContext(bgDispatcher) {
 83→                unifiedStore.getCommentByLocalId(localId.toLong()).firstOrNull()?.let {
 84→                    commentsMapper.commentEntityToLegacyModel(it)
 85→                }
 86→            }
 87→        }
 88→    }
 89→
 90→    fun getCommentBySiteAndRemoteId(site: SiteModel, remoteCommentId: Long): CommentModel? {
 91→        return runBlocking {
 92→            withContext(bgDispatcher) {
 93→                unifiedStore.getCommentByLocalSiteAndRemoteId(site.id, remoteCommentId).firstOrNull()?.let {
 94→                    commentsMapper.commentEntityToLegacyModel(it)
 95→                }
 96→            }
 97→        }
 98→    }
 99→
100→    @Suppress("unused", "FunctionParameterNaming")
101→    fun register(`object`: Any?) {
102→        dispatcher.register(`object`)
103→    }
104→
105→    @Suppress("unused", "FunctionParameterNaming")
106→    fun unregister(`object`: Any?) {
107→        dispatcher.unregister(`object`)
108→    }
109→
110→    fun dispatch(action: Action<*>) {
111→        if (action.type !is CommentAction) {
112→            dispatcher.dispatch(action)
113→            return
114→        }
115→
116→        val actionToDispatch = when (action.type as CommentAction) {
117→            FETCH_COMMENTS -> CommentsActionBuilder.newFetchCommentsAction(action.payload as FetchCommentsPayload)
118→            FETCH_COMMENT -> CommentsActionBuilder.newFetchCommentAction(action.payload as RemoteCommentPayload)
119→            CREATE_NEW_COMMENT -> CommentsActionBuilder.newCreateNewCommentAction(
120→                action.payload as RemoteCreateCommentPayload
121→            )
122→            PUSH_COMMENT -> CommentsActionBuilder.newPushCommentAction(action.payload as RemoteCommentPayload)
123→            DELETE_COMMENT -> CommentsActionBuilder.newDeleteCommentAction(action.payload as RemoteCommentPayload)
124→            LIKE_COMMENT -> CommentsActionBuilder.newLikeCommentAction(action.payload as RemoteCommentPayload)
125→            UPDATE_COMMENT -> CommentsActionBuilder.newUpdateCommentAction(action.payload as CommentModel)
126→            FETCH_COMMENT_LIKES,
127→            FETCHED_COMMENTS,
128→            FETCHED_COMMENT,
129→            CREATED_NEW_COMMENT,
130→            PUSHED_COMMENT,
131→            DELETED_COMMENT,
132→            LIKED_COMMENT,
133→            FETCHED_COMMENT_LIKES,
134→            REMOVE_COMMENTS,
135→            REMOVE_COMMENT,
136→            REMOVE_ALL_COMMENTS -> {
137→                logOrCrash("CommentsStoreAdapter->dispatch: action received ${action.type} was not expected")
138→                null
139→            }
140→        }
141→
142→        actionToDispatch?.let {
143→            dispatcher.dispatch(actionToDispatch)
144→        }
145→    }
146→
147→    private fun logOrCrash(msg: String) {
148→        if (BuildConfig.DEBUG) {
149→            throw IllegalArgumentException(msg)
150→        } else {
151→            AppLog.e(T.COMMENTS, msg)
152→        }
153→    }
154→}
